Localization.Description: Login to the system via the RDP protocol

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user is logging in to the system via the {protocol.layer7} protocol on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not log in to the system via the {protocol.layer7} protocol on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is logging in to the system via the {protocol.layer7} protocol on host {event_src.host}
A user could not log in to the system via the {protocol.layer7} protocol on host {event_src.host}
